title: Community projects
excerpt: description: Explore community-built ORMs, query builders, and tools that integrate with D1. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Members of the Cloudflare developer community and broader developer ecosystem have built and/or contributed tooling — including ORMs (Object Relational Mapper) libraries, query builders, and CLI tools — that build on top of D1. Community projects are not maintained by the Cloudflare D1 team. They are managed and updated by the project authors.
